title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
